# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Distribute Application

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'release/*'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_configuration:
        description: 'Build configuration (Debug/Release)'
        required: true
        default: 'Release'
        type: choice
        options:
          - Debug
          - Release
      target_platform:
        description: 'Target platform'
        required: true
        default: 'all'
        type: choice
        options:
          - all
          - linux
          - windows
          - macos

env:
  BUILD_CONFIG: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_configuration || 'Release' }}
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: 30

jobs:
  build-linux:
    if: ${{ github.event.inputs.target_platform == 'all' || github.event.inputs.target_platform == 'linux' || github.event.inputs.target_platform == '' }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        arch: [x64]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up build environment
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y build-essential cmake pkg-config zip

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Generate build metadata
        id: metadata
        run: |
          echo "build_date=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "short_sha=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "version=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "branch=${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          npm run build -- --configuration=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test -- --ci --coverage

      - name: Compile binaries for Linux
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}
          npm run package -- --platform=linux --arch=${{ matrix.arch }} --output=dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}

      - name: Prepare configuration files
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/config
          cp -r config/templates/* dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/config/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp config/default.yml dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/config/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp config/production.yml dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/config/ 2>/dev/null || true

          envsubst < config/build-info.template.yml > dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/config/build-info.yml <<EOF
          build_date: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.build_date }}
          version: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}
          commit: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          branch: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.branch }}
          configuration: ${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}
          platform: linux-${{ matrix.arch }}
          EOF

      - name: Prepare deployment scripts
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts
          cp -r deploy/scripts/linux/* dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp deploy/scripts/common/* dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/ 2>/dev/null || true
          chmod +x dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true

          cat > dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/install.sh << 'SCRIPT'
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euo pipefail
          SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
          APP_DIR="${1:-/opt/myapp}"
          echo "Installing application to ${APP_DIR}..."
          sudo mkdir -p "${APP_DIR}"
          sudo cp -r "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../"* "${APP_DIR}/"
          sudo chmod +x "${APP_DIR}/bin/"* 2>/dev/null || true
          echo "Installation complete."
          SCRIPT
          chmod +x dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/install.sh

          cat > dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/health-check.sh << 'SCRIPT'
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euo pipefail
          APP_DIR="${1:-/opt/myapp}"
          if [ -f "${APP_DIR}/bin/myapp" ]; then
            echo "Binary exists: OK"
          else
            echo "Binary missing: FAIL"
            exit 1
          fi
          if [ -f "${APP_DIR}/config/default.yml" ]; then
            echo "Config exists: OK"
          else
            echo "Config missing: FAIL"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Health check passed."
          SCRIPT
          chmod +x dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/health-check.sh

      - name: Generate checksums
        working-directory: dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}
        run: |
          find . -type f -not -name 'checksums.sha256' | sort | xargs sha256sum > checksums.sha256

      - name: Create build manifest
        run: |
          cat > dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/BUILD_MANIFEST.json << EOF
          {
            "application": "myapp",
            "version": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}",
            "build_date": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.build_date }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "short_sha": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}",
            "branch": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.branch }}",
            "build_number": "${{ github.run_number }}",
            "build_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "configuration": "${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}",
            "platform": "linux",
            "architecture": "${{ matrix.arch }}",
            "runner": "${{ runner.os }}",
            "triggered_by": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "event": "${{ github.event_name }}"
          }
          EOF

      - name: Upload Linux build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-linux-${{ matrix.arch }}-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: dist/linux-${{ matrix.arch }}/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload test coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-report-linux-${{ matrix.arch }}
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 14

  build-windows:
    if: ${{ github.event.inputs.target_platform == 'all' || github.event.inputs.target_platform == 'windows' || github.event.inputs.target_platform == '' }}
    runs-on: windows-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        arch: [x64]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Generate build metadata
        id: metadata
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $date = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ"
          $shortSha = git rev-parse --short HEAD
          $version = (Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json).version
          "build_date=$date" >> $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT
          "short_sha=$shortSha" >> $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT
          "version=$version" >> $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build -- --configuration=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test -- --ci

      - name: Compile binaries for Windows
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}
          npm run package -- --platform=win32 --arch=${{ matrix.arch }} --output=dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}

      - name: Prepare configuration files
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}/config
          if (Test-Path config/templates) { Copy-Item -Recurse config/templates/* dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}/config/ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
          if (Test-Path config/default.yml) { Copy-Item config/default.yml dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}/config/ }
          if (Test-Path config/production.yml) { Copy-Item config/production.yml dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}/config/ }

      - name: Prepare deployment scripts
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts
          if (Test-Path deploy/scripts/windows) { Copy-Item -Recurse deploy/scripts/windows/* dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
          if (Test-Path deploy/scripts/common) { Copy-Item -Recurse deploy/scripts/common/* dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

          @'
          param(
              [string]$InstallDir = "C:\Program Files\MyApp"
          )
          Write-Host "Installing application to $InstallDir..."
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $InstallDir | Out-Null
          Copy-Item -Recurse -Force "$PSScriptRoot\..\*" $InstallDir
          Write-Host "Installation complete."
          '@ | Out-File -FilePath dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/install.ps1 -Encoding utf8

      - name: Generate checksums
        shell: pwsh
        working-directory: dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}
        run: |
          Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne 'checksums.sha256' } | ForEach-Object {
            $hash = (Get-FileHash $_.FullName -Algorithm SHA256).Hash.ToLower()
            $relativePath = $_.FullName.Substring((Get-Location).Path.Length + 1)
            "$hash  $relativePath"
          } | Out-File -FilePath checksums.sha256 -Encoding utf8

      - name: Create build manifest
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $manifest = @{
            application = "myapp"
            version = "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}"
            build_date = "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.build_date }}"
            commit_sha = "${{ github.sha }}"
            short_sha = "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}"
            branch = "${{ github.ref_name }}"
            build_number = "${{ github.run_number }}"
            build_id = "${{ github.run_id }}"
            configuration = "${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}"
            platform = "windows"
            architecture = "${{ matrix.arch }}"
            triggered_by = "${{ github.actor }}"
            event = "${{ github.event_name }}"
          } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3
          $manifest | Out-File -FilePath dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}/BUILD_MANIFEST.json -Encoding utf8

      - name: Upload Windows build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-windows-${{ matrix.arch }}-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: dist/windows-${{ matrix.arch }}/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error

  build-macos:
    if: ${{ github.event.inputs.target_platform == 'all' || github.event.inputs.target_platform == 'macos' || github.event.inputs.target_platform == '' }}
    runs-on: macos-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        arch: [x64, arm64]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Generate build metadata
        id: metadata
        run: |
          echo "build_date=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "short_sha=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "version=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build -- --configuration=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test -- --ci

      - name: Compile binaries for macOS
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}
          npm run package -- --platform=darwin --arch=${{ matrix.arch }} --output=dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}

      - name: Prepare configuration files
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/config
          cp -r config/templates/* dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/config/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp config/default.yml dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/config/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp config/production.yml dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/config/ 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Prepare deployment scripts
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts
          cp -r deploy/scripts/macos/* dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp deploy/scripts/common/* dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/ 2>/dev/null || true
          chmod +x dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true

          cat > dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/install.sh << 'SCRIPT'
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euo pipefail
          APP_DIR="${1:-/Applications/MyApp}"
          echo "Installing application to ${APP_DIR}..."
          mkdir -p "${APP_DIR}"
          cp -r "$(dirname "$0")/../"* "${APP_DIR}/"
          chmod +x "${APP_DIR}/bin/"* 2>/dev/null || true
          echo "Installation complete."
          SCRIPT
          chmod +x dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/scripts/install.sh

      - name: Generate checksums
        working-directory: dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}
        run: |
          find . -type f -not -name 'checksums.sha256' | sort | xargs shasum -a 256 > checksums.sha256

      - name: Create build manifest
        run: |
          cat > dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/BUILD_MANIFEST.json << EOF
          {
            "application": "myapp",
            "version": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}",
            "build_date": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.build_date }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "short_sha": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}",
            "branch": "${{ github.ref_name }}",
            "build_number": "${{ github.run_number }}",
            "build_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "configuration": "${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}",
            "platform": "macos",
            "architecture": "${{ matrix.arch }}",
            "triggered_by": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "event": "${{ github.event_name }}"
          }
          EOF

      - name: Upload macOS build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-macos-${{ matrix.arch }}-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: dist/macos-${{ matrix.arch }}/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error

  create-distribution-bundle:
    needs: [build-linux, build-windows, build-macos]
    if: always() && !cancelled() && (needs.build-linux.result == 'success' || needs.build-windows.result == 'success' || needs.build-macos.result == 'success')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            package.json
            CHANGELOG.md
            README.md
            LICENSE

      - name: Generate metadata
        id: metadata
        run: |
          echo "short_sha=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "version=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "build_date=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Download all build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: all-artifacts/
          pattern: build-*

      - name: Create distribution summary
        run: |
          mkdir -p distribution-bundle

          cat > distribution-bundle/DISTRIBUTION_INFO.md << EOF
          # Build Distribution

          **Application:** myapp
          **Version:** ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}
          **Build Number:** ${{ github.run_number }}
          **Build Date:** ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.build_date }}
          **Commit:** ${{ github.sha }}
          **Branch:** ${{ github.ref_name }}
          **Triggered By:** ${{ github.actor }}
          **Configuration:** ${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}

          ## Available Platforms

          $(ls -d all-artifacts/build-* 2>/dev/null | sed 's|all-artifacts/build-|- |g' || echo "No artifacts found")

          ## Download Instructions

          1. Go to the Actions tab in GitHub
          2. Find this workflow run (#${{ github.run_number }})
          3. Scroll to the Artifacts section
          4. Download the artifact for your target platform

          ## Artifact Contents

          Each platform artifact contains:
          - **bin/**: Compiled application binaries
          - **config/**: Configuration files and templates
          - **scripts/**: Deployment and installation scripts
          - **BUILD_MANIFEST.json**: Build metadata
          - **checksums.sha256**: SHA-256 checksums for all files

          ## Installation

          ### Linux / macOS
          \`\`\`bash
          chmod +x scripts/install.sh
          ./scripts/install.sh [install-directory]
          \`\`\`

          ### Windows
          \`\`\`powershell
          .\scripts\install.ps1 [-InstallDir "C:\path\to\install"]
          \`\`\`
          EOF

          cat > distribution-bundle/all-builds-manifest.json << EOF
          {
            "distribution_id": "${{ github.run_id }}-${{ github.run_number }}",
            "version": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}",
            "build_date": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.build_date }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "branch": "${{ github.ref_name }}",
            "configuration": "${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}",
            "artifacts": $(ls -d all-artifacts/build-* 2>/dev/null | sed 's|all-artifacts/||g' | jq -R -s 'split("\n") | map(select(. != ""))'),
            "workflow_url": "${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          }
          EOF

          cp CHANGELOG.md distribution-bundle/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp README.md distribution-bundle/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp LICENSE distribution-bundle/ 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Upload distribution bundle
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: distribution-bundle-v${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}-build${{ github.run_number }}
          path: distribution-bundle/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}

  notify-team:
    needs: [create-distribution-bundle]
    if: always() && needs.create-distribution-bundle.result == 'success'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout for version info
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: package.json

      - name: Get version
        id: version
        run: echo "version=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Post build summary
        run: |
          WORKFLOW_URL="${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"

          cat >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY << EOF
          ## 📦 Build Distribution Ready

          | Property | Value |
          |----------|-------|
          | **Version** | ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }} |
          | **Build Number** | ${{ github.run_number }} |
          | **Configuration** | ${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }} |
          | **Branch** | ${{ github.ref_name }} |
          | **Commit** | \`$(echo ${{ github.sha }} | cut -c1-7)\` |
          | **Triggered By** | @${{ github.actor }} |

          ### 🔗 Download Artifacts

          Visit the [workflow run page](${WORKFLOW_URL}) and scroll to the **Artifacts** section to download builds for your platform.

          Artifacts are retained for **${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }} days**.

          ### Available Artifacts
          - 🐧 Linux x64 build
          - 🪟 Windows x64 build
          - 🍎 macOS x64 build
          - 🍎 macOS arm64 build
          - 📋 Distribution bundle (docs & manifests)
          EOF
